parameters.jsonBody: ={"model":"claude-sonnet-4-20250514","max_tokens":1024,"system":"You are a content strategist for an AI automation creator. Pick the 1 most interesting, surprising, or actionable stories from the list below for an audience of freelancers and agency owners. Return ONLY a raw JSON array of exactly 1 object with fields: title, summary, source_url. No markdown, no explanation.","messages":[{"role":"user","content":{{ JSON.stringify($json.stories.map(s => ({title: s.title, summary: s.summary, source_url: s.source_url, feed: s.feed}))) }}}]}

={"model":"claude-sonnet-4-20250514","max_tokens":2048,"system":{{ JSON.stringify($json.voicePrompt) }},"messages":[{"role":"user","content":"Write a 10-slide Instagram carousel script about this story:

Title: " + $json.title + "

Summary: " + $json.summary + "

Return ONLY a raw JSON array of exactly 10 objects with fields: slide_number (integer), headline (string), body_text (string, max 20 words). No markdown, no explanation.

Slide 1: hook. Slides 2-8: content. Slide 9: takeaway. Slide 10: CTA - Follow @abdulrahmann.o for daily AI automation tips."}]}
